logic_order: check prior testosterone labs; if missing, route to lab-confirmation pathway
require symptoms/signs plus repeated morning low testosterone before TRT candidate logic
differentiate primary vs secondary hypogonadism with LH/FSH when confirmed
run prostate/PSA, hematocrit, CV/BP, OSA, LUTS gates
if no confirmed deficiency, route to men's wellness non-TRT pathway
if age-related low T with sexual dysfunction, use shared decision logic and response tracking
route all clinical changes to provider decision; no dosing in this layer
